content_body: My husband and I stayed here for a weekend and it was just blissful. The views were exquisite, the air was crisp and the accommodations were quite cozy. The place itself had everything we needed to enjoy ourselves, and the recommendations the cabin gave us were also great. We enjoyed the pool table and watched movies by the fire, ate breakfast on the porch with the magnificent view in between trips to vineyards, downtown, and horseback riding. A very pleasant stay, and I would definitely do it again!
title: Just Blissful
